visual_features.overall_style: Friendly, modern and light community style with flat design, soft pastel colors and a playful illustration header. Feels approachable rather than corporate, with a clear focus on readability and simplicity.
visual_features.visual_hierarchy: Hierarchy is driven by color contrast (warm coral header & titles vs. soft gray background), size (large hero navigation bar, large card image, bold orange listing title), and spacing (single prominent card separated from edges by generous margins). The top coral band with illustration and navigation is the first focal area, followed by the large image at the top of the listing card, then the orange uppercase title, then the body text and cookie bar at the bottom.
visual_features.whitespace_usage: Generous whitespace overall. Large left/right gutters around the main card, wide spacing between the navigation bar and content, and ample padding within the card itself. The right side of the viewport is mostly empty, reinforcing a low-density, breathable layout.
unique_elements: Playful illustrated skyline on a hill integrated into the top header
Wide, solid coral navigation bar spanning the full width
Single, large listing card aligned to the left within a wide pale-gray canvas
Cookie consent bar with full-width white background and mixed button styles (text link + ghost + solid CTA)

layout_characteristics.grid_system: Likely a 12-column responsive grid with a main content column occupying approximately 4–5 columns on desktop and large side gutters.
layout_characteristics.layout_pattern: Full-width fixed header with horizontal navigation, followed by a left-aligned content column of cards on a pale-gray page background, plus a sticky/anchored bottom cookie-consent bar.
layout_characteristics.section_organization: Top: illustration and navigation on a solid coral background. Middle: content area with individual listing card(s) on a light-gray canvas. Bottom: full-width cookie notice with text and actions. Sections are clearly delimited by background color changes.
layout_characteristics.alignment: Global left alignment for content; navigation items centered within the header horizontally. Text within cards is left-aligned. Buttons in the cookie bar are right-aligned while explanatory text is left-aligned, creating a clear action area on the right.
responsive_hints: Single-column card layout suggests stacking behavior on smaller screens.
Large, full-width header and cookie bar adapt naturally to any viewport width.
Generous gutters suggest they can collapse on tablet/mobile to keep content readable.
layout_characteristics.content_arrangement: Linear top-to-bottom flow: (1) full-width coral header with illustration at far left and centered horizontal nav links; (2) beneath this, a spacious light-gray content area containing a large vertical card placed toward the left; card structure is image on top, followed by white content block with title, metadata, description, and a circular badge overlapping the image/content boundary; (3) at the bottom, a full-width cookie banner with text spanning left and three actions on the right (link, ghost button, solid CTA button).
layout_characteristics.space_allocation: Header occupies roughly the top 15–20% of the viewport height. The central card takes up a moderate vertical slice but is framed by wide top and side margins, leaving a large empty area to the right and below, leading to an airy layout. The cookie bar is relatively shallow but spans the full width. Inside components, padding around text is ~16–24px, giving each element clear separation.
layout_characteristics.content_density: Spacious layout with low visual density: only one primary card is visible within a large canvas, with very generous margins between sections and components. Text blocks are short; no dense tables or lists are present in the visible area.
layout_characteristics.visual_flow: Eye enters at the illustrated header on the upper left, travels horizontally along the coral bar to scan the navigation items (Z-pattern top row). From there it moves down to the large image inside the card, then to the bold orange listing title below the image, and continues downward through the metadata and description. Finally, attention is pulled to the high-contrast cookie bar at the bottom, with the solid coral CTA button on the right acting as the last strong focal point.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Rectangular buttons with slightly rounded corners (~4px radius). The primary style (e.g., 'J'accepte') uses a solid coral fill (#FF8266) with white text in uppercase or semi-uppercase, likely medium or semibold weight. The secondary/ghost button ('Non merci') uses a light gray fill (#D3D7DD) with darker gray text. Hit areas appear to have around 10–14px vertical padding and 20–24px horizontal padding. No visible heavy shadows; flat design with subtle hover change likely via background or border color.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Likely implemented as <button> or <a> elements styled as buttons, possibly within a flex container for right alignment. Buttons may include utility classes for primary vs. secondary styling and may live inside a parent div with role='group' in components like the cookie bar.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Vertical card with white background, light border or very subtle drop shadow for elevation (shadow blur around 4–8px, low opacity). Corners are minimally rounded (~4px). Top section is a full-bleed image with squared top corners. Below the image, the content area has generous padding (~20–24px). A circular badge (light blue) overlaps the bottom of the image and top of the white content area, creating a layered effect. Title text is bold, uppercase, coral-colored. Below are smaller gray metadata lines and lighter-weight body text. Overall card feels clean and editorial.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Not directly visible, but inferred style: flat inputs with subtle 1px light-gray borders (#E4EAF0), 4px corner radius, white background, and comfortable vertical padding (~10px). Labels likely sit above inputs, left-aligned. Primary actions (submit) would reuse the coral button style; secondary actions reuse the gray ghost style. Validation would probably use colored border/text (red for errors) and small helper text under the field.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Forms likely use stacked label-input pairs within a single column layout (<form> with <div class='form-group'> wrappers). Labels as <label> above <input> / <select> / <textarea>. Error messages as <small class='error'> under the corresponding input. For longer forms, fields might be grouped using <fieldset> or heading dividers.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Full-width top navigation bar with solid coral background. Navigation items are horizontal text links, evenly spaced, all-caps, white text, and medium/semibold weight. They are centered visually across the header, not hugging the edges. There is no visible underline, suggesting active/hover states may be indicated through slight color shifts or underline on interaction. Overall look is flat, bold, and clean.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Likely a semantic <nav> element containing an unordered list (<ul><li><a> pattern). Items displayed via flexbox or inline-block for horizontal layout, with center justification. Active page could be marked with a specific class (e.g., 'is-active') applied to the <li> or <a> element to adjust color or underline.

ui_patterns.visual_description: The card itself behaves as a list item in a directory. Items appear as large, low-density cards rather than compact rows. Within the card, metadata and rating are displayed inline with small icons (speech bubble, stars) and separated by thin vertical bars. Separation between different listing cards (not visible but implied) would be achieved via margins around each card rather than dividing lines.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Overall directory likely uses a container <div class='cards-list'> with each listing as <article class='card'>. Inside, metadata is arranged using flexbox 'media object' patterns (icon + text spans) or simple inline elements. No table layout is implied; instead, cards are stacked or arranged via grid/flex.

heading.visual_style: Sans-serif, bold, with clean lines and moderate roundness; uppercase navigation and card titles give a strong, friendly tone typical of a geometric/humanist sans.

body.visual_style: Simple, readable sans-serif with balanced proportions and good legibility at small sizes; neutral, not overly condensed.

spacing_system.component_padding: Cards and bars use roughly 16–24px padding on all sides (2–3 base units), with slightly reduced padding (8–12px) inside compact elements like buttons and metadata rows.
spacing_system.section_margin: Vertical spacing between major sections (header ↔ content, content ↔ cookie bar) is around 32–48px, maintaining strong separation and breathing room.

interaction_hints: Navigation links likely change color (lighter/darker coral or white with underline) on hover and may show an underline or indicator for the active page.
Buttons likely use background-color transitions on hover (slightly darker coral or gray) and possibly a subtle box-shadow or scale effect to indicate clickability.
Cards may have a hover elevation effect: slightly stronger shadow, subtle upward translate (2–4px), or border color accent to show interactivity when the card is clickable.
Icons like comment and star ratings may respond to hover with color changes (e.g., gray to coral) indicating they can be interacted with.
Cookie bar buttons probably have straightforward hover/active states with quick, linear or ease-in-out transitions (~150–250ms) to keep the experience smooth but unobtrusive.
